name: ALNYLAM PHARMACEUTICALS, INC.
business: Alnylam Pharmaceuticals, Inc. is a global commercial-stage biopharmaceutical company developing novel therapeutics based on ribonucleic acid interference (RNAi). The company currently has six marketed products: AMVUTTRA, ONPATTRO, GIVLAARI, OXLUMO, Leqvio (commercialized by Novartis), and Qfitlia (commercialized by Sanofi). These products target diseases such as hereditary transthyretin-mediated amyloidosis, acute hepatic porphyria, primary hyperoxaluria type 1, hypercholesterolemia, and hemophilia.
sellsTo: patients with ATTR amyloidosis with cardiomyopathy
patients with hemophilia A or B

exposures.sentence: Alnylam Pharmaceuticals, Inc. is a global commercial-stage biopharmaceutical company developing novel therapeutics based on ribonucleic acid interference, or RNAi.
In early 2026, we launched our Alnylam 2030 strategy to drive the Company's next era of growth and patient impact.

catalysts.event: Initiation of TRITON-PN Phase 3 clinical trial of nucresiran in hATTR polyneuropathy
catalysts.sentence: In September 2025, we initiated the TRITON-PN Phase 3 clinical trial of nucresiran in patients with hATTR polyneuropathy.

catalysts.event: Initiation of TRITON-CM Phase 3 clinical trial of nucresiran in ATTR cardiomyopathy
catalysts.sentence: In June 2025, we initiated the TRITON-CM Phase 3 clinical trial of nucresiran in patients with ATTR amyloidosis with cardiomyopathy.

catalysts.event: Initiation of ZENITH Phase 3 cardiovascular outcomes trial of zilebesiran
catalysts.sentence: In September 2025, we initiated a Phase 3 cardiovascular outcomes clinical trial, ZENITH (ZilebEsiraN CardIovascular OuTcome Study in Hypertension).

catalysts.event: Expect to initiate Phase 2 trial of mivelsiran in Alzheimer's disease
catalysts.sentence: We expect to initiate a Phase 2 clinical trial of mivelsiran in patients with AD in the first half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Regeneron planning US regulatory submission for cemdisiran monotherapy
catalysts.sentence: Regeneron is planning a U.S. regulatory submission for cemdisiran monotherapy in the first quarter of 2026, pending discussions with the FDA.

catalysts.event: Expansion of Norton manufacturing facility announced
catalysts.sentence: In December 2025, we announced a planned expansion of the Norton facility designed to increase capacity meaningfully, significantly reduce production costs, and position us to support future launches across our growing pipeline of potential new medicines.

tamClaims.claim: ATTR amyloidosis with cardiomyopathy affects more than 300,000 people worldwide, while hATTR amyloidosis with polyneuropathy affects fewer than 30,000 people worldwide.
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate that ATTR amyloidosis with cardiomyopathy including hereditary and wild-type forms affects more than 300,000 people worldwide, while hATTR amyloidosis with polyneuropathy affects fewer than 30,000 people worldwide.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 3,000 AHP patients diagnosed in the U.S. and EU with active disease.
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate there are approximately 3,000 AHP patients diagnosed in the U.S. and EU with active disease.

tamClaims.claim: PH1 affects an estimated one to three individuals per million in the U.S. and Europe.
tamClaims.sentence: PH1 is an ultra-rare genetic disease that affects an estimated one to three individuals per million in the U.S. and Europe.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 100 million people worldwide suffer from hypercholesterolemia.
tamClaims.sentence: Approximately 100 million people worldwide suffer from hypercholesterolemia.

tamClaims.claim: There are approximately 200,000 people living with hemophilia A and hemophilia B worldwide.
tamClaims.sentence: There are approximately 200,000 people living with hemophilia A and hemophilia B worldwide.

tamClaims.claim: An estimated three million people in the U.S. are living with an inherited bleeding disorder.
tamClaims.sentence: An estimated three million people in the U.S. are living with an inherited bleeding disorder.

tamClaims.claim: HHT is estimated to affect approximately 70,000 people in the U.S. and approximately 1.6 million people worldwide.
tamClaims.sentence: It is estimated to affect approximately 70,000 people in the U.S. and approximately 1.6 million people worldwide.

tamClaims.claim: More than one billion people worldwide live with hypertension.
tamClaims.sentence: More than one billion people worldwide live with hypertension.
